sourceNote: Curated NR2 payer reference for routing and narrative hints. Not member-specific benefits. Verify copay/deductible/max via 270/271 or clearinghouse eligibility. Payer IDs are common electronic routing examples — always confirm on patient ID card and clearinghouse list.

payers.name: Delta Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Largest dental network; state affiliates use different payer IDs. Code 16 often needs narrative + radiographs. Verify state-specific Delta entity on ID card.
payers.eligibilityNotes: 270/271 via clearinghouse; member ID format varies by state.

payers.name: MetLife Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Frequent alternate-benefit downgrades on crowns/composites. Document structural loss and ADA criteria.

payers.name: Cigna Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: DHMO vs PPO paths differ; confirm plan type before narrative. Prior auth common on implants/ortho.

payers.name: Aetna Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Medical/dental plan crossover on appliances; keep narratives clinical not cosmetic.

payers.name: UnitedHealthcare Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Use payer ID 52133 for DBP; UMR uses separate ID. 270/271 service type 35 for dental.

payers.name: Guardian Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Strong on frequency limits for prophy/BWX; document perio charting when billing SRP same visit.

payers.name: Humana Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Medicare Advantage dental riders differ from commercial; do not assume commercial rules.

payers.name: Anthem Blue Cross Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: State BCBS affiliate routing; check claims address on card.

payers.name: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Michigan Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Michigan-specific fee schedules; narrative for major services.

payers.name: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Texas Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Verify HMO vs PPO on card before appeal language.

payers.name: Ameritas Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Network vs out-of-network benefits differ; cite OON rules when applicable.

payers.name: Principal Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Employer-group heavy; eligibility drives annual max remaining.

payers.name: Sun Life Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Canadian/US employer plans; confirm US routing.

payers.name: Lincoln Financial Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Narrative for major services; watch waiting periods on basic/major.

payers.name: Unum Dental / AlwaysCare
payers.narrativeNotes: Administered benefits; card may show TPA name not Unum.

payers.name: DentaQuest
payers.narrativeNotes: Medicaid MCO in many states; prior auth and medical necessity language stricter.

payers.name: Liberty Dental Plan
payers.narrativeNotes: Medicaid-focused; frequency and prior auth rules vary by state contract.

payers.name: MCNA Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: State Medicaid dental administrator; use state portal for PA status.

payers.name: Envolve Dental / Ambetter Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Marketplace/Medicaid mix; verify active coverage every visit.

payers.name: Careington / Discount Plans
payers.narrativeNotes: Discount plan not insurance — do not draft insurance appeal narratives; patient pays contracted fee.

payers.name: DenteMax Network
payers.narrativeNotes: Network leasing; claims go to primary payer on card, not DenteMax.

payers.name: Beam Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Tech-forward employer plans; eligibility API often required for accurate max.

payers.name: Dominion National
payers.narrativeNotes: Mid-Atlantic focus; Federal/FEHB common.

payers.name: GEHA Dental (Connection Dental)
payers.narrativeNotes: Federal employee plans; separate FEHB rules.

payers.name: AARP Dental Insurance (Delta)
payers.narrativeNotes: Administered by Delta; use Delta narrative standards and routing.

payers.name: Delta Dental of California
payers.narrativeNotes: Separate from national Delta; strict 270/271 member match on DOB/name.

payers.name: Delta Dental of New York
payers.narrativeNotes: Northeast employer groups; narrative for major/restorative.

payers.name: Delta Dental of Washington
payers.narrativeNotes: Verify Premier vs PPO on eligibility response.

payers.name: Delta Dental of Missouri
payers.narrativeNotes: Regional fee schedule; attach perio chart for SRP.

payers.name: Delta Dental of Pennsylvania
payers.narrativeNotes: Common in mid-Atlantic employer market.

payers.name: Premera Blue Cross Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Pacific Northwest; medical/dental plan separation important for appliances.

payers.name: Kaiser Permanente Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: HMO capitation model in some regions; referrals may apply.

payers.name: SKYGEN / Scion Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Third-party administrator; card shows underlying payer — bill correct entity.

payers.name: Healthplex / EmblemHealth Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: NY metro; verify Emblem vs Healthplex routing on card.

payers.name: State Medicaid Dental (generic)
payers.narrativeNotes: State-specific rules; prior auth, age limits, and CDT coverage vary. Never assume commercial rules.

payers.name: Medicare Advantage Dental Rider
payers.narrativeNotes: Supplemental dental only; low annual max common. Medical plan handles TMJ differently.

payers.name: TRICARE Dental (United Concordia)
payers.narrativeNotes: Active duty family plans; follow TRICARE frequency tables.

payers.name: FEP BlueDental
payers.narrativeNotes: Federal employees; narrative for crowns/endo with chart docs.

payers.name: Teamsters / Union Dental Trusts
payers.narrativeNotes: Trust-specific fee schedules; verify trust name on card.

payers.name: Argus Dental Vision
payers.narrativeNotes: Bundled dental/vision admin; confirm dental routing.

payers.name: Avesis Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Vision/dental admin; Medicaid and commercial mix.

payers.name: Dental Select
payers.narrativeNotes: Regional PPO; eligibility before major treatment plan.

payers.name: Renaissance Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Humana affiliate in some markets; verify legal entity on 271.

payers.name: Solstice Benefits Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: TPA; employer-specific plan docs drive coverage.

payers.name: Meritain Health Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Aetna company TPA; use Meritain payer ID on claims.

payers.name: Local Union / Taft-Hartley Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Plan booklet governs; narrative should cite trust plan section when appealing.

payers.name: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Kansas Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Kansas BCBS affiliate routing — verify payer ID on Kansas member card. Narrative for major services; coordinate medical/dental for appliances.

payers.name: Self-Pay / No Insurance
payers.narrativeNotes: No insurance narrative needed; use financial policy and treatment consent only.
